title: Phone is successfully registered to Cloud
scenario: Poly Lens app Account section shows mobile device correctly linked and appearing in lens server inventory list after login
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Lens app on the mobile device.
4. Open the Lens server inventory list.
5. Verify that the mobile app appears in the inventory list.
6. Confirm that the mobile app is correctly linked to the proper device (Android or iPhone).
expected: The mobile app appears in the Lens server inventory list and is correctly linked to the proper device (Android or iPhone).
